title: Chromita
description: A utility for generating structured color palettes and harmonies for UI systems, design workflows and component libraries.
overview: The Color Palette Generator is a tool designed to help developers and designers create structured color palettes quickly. Starting from a base color, the system can generate shades, harmonies and complete palettes that can be exported to CSS or Tailwind configurations. The application also includes accessibility checks, UI previews and AI-generated palettes to assist with design exploration.
problem: Designing consistent color palettes is often time-consuming. Developers need balanced color scales for UI components, accessible contrast ratios and quick ways to export palettes to their codebases. Creating these palettes manually frequently leads to inconsistent results and inefficient workflows.
solution: The tool generates color palettes programmatically by transforming color values and calculating shade variations. It also supports harmony generation, palette exports and accessibility validation, allowing developers and designers to experiment with palettes while maintaining visual consistency and accessibility standards.

features.title: Color Picker
features.description: Select a base color that will be used to generate the palette.

features.title: Shade Control
features.description: Adjust how many shades the palette should generate.

features.title: Harmony Generator
features.description: Generate palettes based on color harmony systems such as monochrome, complementary or triadic.

features.title: Random Palette
features.description: Instantly generate a completely random palette for exploration.

features.title: Interactive Color Cards
features.description: Hover each color to reveal HEX, RGB and HSL values.

features.title: Copy to Clipboard
features.description: Copy individual colors or the entire palette to the clipboard.

features.title: Export CSS Variables
features.description: Export the palette as CSS variables ready to use in a design system.

features.title: UI Preview
features.description: Preview how the palette looks applied to UI components.

features.title: Accessibility Checker
features.description: Evaluate contrast ratios and WCAG compliance for color combinations.

features.title: AI Palette Generator
features.description: Generate palettes using AI from descriptive prompts or design themes.

architecture:
ColorPaletteGenerator
│
├── ColorPicker
├── ShadeControl
├── HarmonySelector
├── RandomPalette
│
├── PaletteGrid
│    └── ColorCard
│
├── UIPreview
├── AccessibilityChecker
│
├── CopyPalette
├── ExportCSSVariables
├── ExportTailwindPalette
│
├── AIPaletteGenerator
│
├── usePalette (state management hook)
│
├── generateShades (shade generation logic)
└── generateHarmony (color harmony logic)

developmentFlow.title: Idea
developmentFlow.description: Create a tool for generating structured color palettes.

developmentFlow.title: Color Algorithm
developmentFlow.description: Implement shade generation based on HSL transformations.

developmentFlow.title: Palette Interaction
developmentFlow.description: Build interactive color cards with copy functionality.

developmentFlow.title: Advanced Features
developmentFlow.description: Add harmony generation, random palettes and export utilities.

developmentFlow.title: Design Utilities
developmentFlow.description: Integrate UI preview and accessibility checking tools.

developmentFlow.title: AI Integration
developmentFlow.description: Allow palette generation through AI prompts.

developmentFlow.title: Testing
developmentFlow.description: Validate interactions, palette generation and accessibility calculations.

lessons: Designing reusable UI components for tool interfaces.
Managing palette state and external palette injections.
Handling color conversions between HEX, RGB and HSL formats.
Implementing accessibility checks using contrast ratio algorithms.
Building export utilities for CSS variables and Tailwind configurations.
Integrating AI services into frontend tools.
nextSteps: Allow palette locking similar to professional color tools.
Add palette history and undo functionality.
Add keyboard shortcuts for faster palette exploration.
